---
title: "The AI Engineering Community"
subtitle: "A global network of students, educators, and engineers advancing AI systems education — from Harvard classrooms to universities on six continents."
format:
  html:
    toc: true
    toc-depth: 2
---

::: {.content-visible when-format="html"}

```{=html}
<style>
/* ── Stats Row ────────────────────────────────────────────────────── */
.stats-row {
  display: flex;
  gap: 2rem;
  flex-wrap: wrap;
  margin: 0.5rem 0 2rem;
  padding-bottom: 1.5rem;
  border-bottom: 1px solid #e2e8f0;
}
.stat { text-align: center; }
.stat-num {
  font-size: 1.6rem;
  font-weight: 700;
  color: #A51C30;
  display: block;
  line-height: 1.2;
}
.stat-lbl {
  font-size: 0.75rem;
  color: #64748b;
  text-transform: uppercase;
  letter-spacing: 0.05em;
}

/* ── Channel Cards ────────────────────────────────────────────────── */
.channel-grid {
  display: grid;
  grid-template-columns: repeat(auto-fit, minmax(220px, 1fr));
  gap: 1rem;
  margin: 1.5rem 0;
}
.channel-card {
  display: block;
  padding: 1.25rem;
  border: 1px solid #e2e8f0;
  border-radius: 10px;
  text-decoration: none !important;
  color: inherit !important;
  transition: all 0.2s;
}
.channel-card:hover {
  border-color: #A51C30;
  box-shadow: 0 4px 12px rgba(165, 28, 48, 0.08);
  transform: translateY(-2px);
}
.channel-card .channel-icon {
  font-size: 1.5rem;
  display: block;
  margin-bottom: 0.5rem;
}
.channel-card h3 {
  font-size: 1rem;
  font-weight: 700;
  margin: 0 0 0.3rem;
  border: none !important;
  padding: 0 !important;
}
.channel-card p {
  font-size: 0.85rem;
  color: #64748b;
  line-height: 1.45;
  margin: 0;
}

/* ── Program Cards ────────────────────────────────────────────────── */
.program-grid {
  display: grid;
  grid-template-columns: repeat(auto-fit, minmax(300px, 1fr));
  gap: 1.25rem;
  margin: 1.5rem 0;
}
.program-card {
  border: 1px solid #e2e8f0;
  border-radius: 10px;
  padding: 1.5rem;
  position: relative;
  overflow: hidden;
}
.program-card::before {
  content: '';
  position: absolute;
  top: 0; left: 0; width: 4px; height: 100%;
  background: #A51C30;
}
.program-card .program-tag {
  font-size: 0.7rem;
  font-weight: 700;
  text-transform: uppercase;
  letter-spacing: 0.08em;
  color: #A51C30;
  margin-bottom: 0.25rem;
  display: block;
}
.program-card h3 {
  font-size: 1.1rem;
  font-weight: 700;
  margin: 0 0 0.4rem;
  border: none !important;
  padding: 0 !important;
}
.program-card p {
  font-size: 0.88rem;
  color: #64748b;
  line-height: 1.5;
  margin: 0;
}
.program-card .program-meta {
  font-size: 0.78rem;
  color: #94a3b8;
  margin-top: 0.75rem;
  padding-top: 0.5rem;
  border-top: 1px solid #f1f5f9;
}

/* ── Event Cards ──────────────────────────────────────────────────── */
.event-list {
  margin: 1.5rem 0;
}
.event-item {
  display: flex;
  gap: 1rem;
  align-items: flex-start;
  padding: 1rem 0;
  border-bottom: 1px solid #f1f5f9;
}
.event-date {
  text-align: center;
  min-width: 50px;
  flex-shrink: 0;
}
.event-date .month {
  font-size: 0.7rem;
  font-weight: 700;
  text-transform: uppercase;
  color: #A51C30;
  display: block;
}
.event-date .day {
  font-size: 1.2rem;
  font-weight: 700;
  color: #1a1a2e;
  display: block;
  line-height: 1.2;
}
.event-info h3 {
  font-size: 0.95rem;
  font-weight: 700;
  margin: 0 0 0.2rem;
  border: none !important;
  padding: 0 !important;
}
.event-info p {
  font-size: 0.85rem;
  color: #64748b;
  margin: 0;
  line-height: 1.45;
}
.event-tag {
  display: inline-block;
  font-size: 0.65rem;
  font-weight: 700;
  padding: 0.15rem 0.5rem;
  border-radius: 10px;
  text-transform: uppercase;
  letter-spacing: 0.05em;
  margin-top: 0.3rem;
}
.tag-workshop { background: rgba(165,28,48,0.1); color: #A51C30; }
.tag-monthly { background: rgba(59,130,246,0.1); color: #3b82f6; }

/* ── Partner Grid ─────────────────────────────────────────────────── */
.partner-grid {
  display: flex;
  flex-wrap: wrap;
  gap: 0.75rem;
  margin: 1.5rem 0;
}
.partner-item {
  padding: 0.5rem 1rem;
  background: #f8fafc;
  border: 1px solid #e2e8f0;
  border-radius: 6px;
  font-size: 0.85rem;
  font-weight: 600;
  color: #475569;
}

/* ── Map ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── */
.map-container {
  margin: 1.5rem 0;
  text-align: center;
}
.map-legend {
  display: flex;
  gap: 1.5rem;
  justify-content: center;
  margin-top: 0.75rem;
  flex-wrap: wrap;
}
.map-legend-item {
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  gap: 0.4rem;
  font-size: 0.78rem;
  color: #64748b;
}
.map-legend-dot {
  width: 8px;
  height: 8px;
  border-radius: 50%;
  flex-shrink: 0;
}

/* ── CTA ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── */
.cta-box {
  background: #fdf2f8;
  border: 1px solid #fce7f3;
  border-radius: 10px;
  padding: 1.5rem 2rem;
  text-align: center;
  margin-top: 2rem;
}
.cta-box h3 {
  font-size: 1.15rem;
  margin: 0 0 0.3rem;
  border: none !important;
  padding: 0 !important;
}
.cta-box p {
  color: #64748b;
  font-size: 0.9rem;
  margin: 0 0 1rem;
}
.cta-box a {
  display: inline-block;
  padding: 0.5rem 1.2rem;
  border-radius: 7px;
  font-weight: 600;
  font-size: 0.85rem;
  text-decoration: none;
  transition: all 0.2s;
  margin: 0 0.25rem;
}
.cta-btn-primary {
  background: #A51C30;
  color: white !important;
}
.cta-btn-primary:hover { background: #8a1728; }
.cta-btn-secondary {
  border: 1.5px solid #e2e8f0;
  color: #475569 !important;
}
.cta-btn-secondary:hover { border-color: #A51C30; color: #A51C30 !important; }

/* ── Responsive ───────────────────────────────────────────────────── */
@media (max-width: 600px) {
  .channel-grid { grid-template-columns: 1fr; }
  .program-grid { grid-template-columns: 1fr; }
}
</style>

<!-- Stats -->
<div class="stats-row">
  <div class="stat"><span class="stat-num">22,800+</span><span class="stat-lbl">GitHub Stars</span></div>
  <div class="stat"><span class="stat-num">90+</span><span class="stat-lbl">Contributors</span></div>
  <div class="stat"><span class="stat-num">40+</span><span class="stat-lbl">Universities</span></div>
  <div class="stat"><span class="stat-num">6</span><span class="stat-lbl">Continents</span></div>
</div>
```

## Get Involved {#join}

Whether you are a student working through the textbook, an educator adopting it for your course, or an engineer who wants to contribute — there is a place for you here.

```{=html}
<div class="channel-grid">
  <a href="https://github.com/harvard-edge/cs249r_book/discussions" target="_blank" rel="noopener" class="channel-card">
    <span class="channel-icon"><i class="fab fa-github"></i></span>
    <h3>GitHub Discussions</h3>
    <p>Ask questions, report issues, and discuss chapters with the community and authors. Our primary forum.</p>
  </a>
  <a href="https://mlsysbook.ai/newsletter/" class="channel-card">
    <span class="channel-icon"><i class="fas fa-envelope"></i></span>
    <h3>Newsletter</h3>
    <p>Updates from the author's desk — new chapters, curriculum news, and community spotlights.</p>
  </a>
  <a href="https://github.com/harvard-edge/cs249r_book" target="_blank" rel="noopener" class="channel-card">
    <span class="channel-icon"><i class="fas fa-code-branch"></i></span>
    <h3>Contribute</h3>
    <p>Submit pull requests, improve chapters, build labs, or review content. Every contribution matters.</p>
  </a>
  <a href="https://opencollective.com/mlsysbook" target="_blank" rel="noopener" class="channel-card">
    <span class="channel-icon"><i class="fas fa-heart"></i></span>
    <h3>Support Us</h3>
    <p>Help expand AI engineering education to under-resourced regions through Open Collective.</p>
  </a>
</div>
```

## Programs {#programs}

The AI Engineering Community runs four programs that bring the curriculum to life beyond the textbook.

```{=html}
<div class="program-grid">
  <div class="program-card">
    <span class="program-tag">Global Network</span>
    <h3>TinyML4D Academic Network</h3>
    <p>A working group focused on enabling ML systems education in developing countries. Faculty from partner institutions receive training, hardware kits, and curriculum materials. Coordinated through ICTP in Trieste, Italy.</p>
    <div class="program-meta">40+ universities · 6 continents · Co-chaired by Marco Zennaro (ICTP) &amp; Marcelo Rovai (UNIFEI)</div>
  </div>
  <div class="program-card">
    <span class="program-tag">Annual Workshop</span>
    <h3>SciTinyML</h3>
    <p>Annual scientific workshop series at the International Centre for Theoretical Physics (ICTP) demonstrating how ML can be applied to real-world scientific challenges — from environmental monitoring to health diagnostics — in resource-constrained settings.</p>
    <div class="program-meta">Trieste, Italy · Running since 2021 · Hands-on hardware labs included</div>
  </div>
  <div class="program-card">
    <span class="program-tag">Monthly Showcase</span>
    <h3>Show &amp; Tell</h3>
    <p>A monthly community showcase where researchers and students present ML projects, share results, and receive feedback from the global community. Open to all skill levels.</p>
    <div class="program-meta">Monthly · Virtual · Chaired by Jeremy Ellis</div>
  </div>
  <div class="program-card">
    <span class="program-tag">Online Certificate</span>
    <h3>edX Professional Certificate</h3>
    <p>The HarvardX TinyML Professional Certificate on edX — a series of courses covering the fundamentals of machine learning on embedded devices. Completed by thousands of learners worldwide.</p>
    <div class="program-meta">Self-paced · edX platform · Instructors: Reddi, Moroney, Warden, Suzuki</div>
  </div>
</div>
```

## Events {#events}

```{=html}
<div class="event-list">
  <div class="event-item">
    <div class="event-date">
      <span class="month">Jun</span>
      <span class="day">TBD</span>
    </div>
    <div class="event-info">
      <h3>SciTinyML 2026</h3>
      <p>ICTP, Trieste, Italy — Scientific applications of TinyML. Regional and global workshops with hands-on hardware labs.</p>
      <span class="event-tag tag-workshop">Workshop</span>
    </div>
  </div>
  <div class="event-item">
    <div class="event-date">
      <span class="month">Jul</span>
      <span class="day">TBD</span>
    </div>
    <div class="event-info">
      <h3>ML Systems Summer School</h3>
      <p>Harvard University, Cambridge, MA — Intensive program covering the full ML systems stack with hands-on labs.</p>
      <span class="event-tag tag-workshop">Program</span>
    </div>
  </div>
  <div class="event-item">
    <div class="event-date">
      <span class="month"></span>
      <span class="day">Monthly</span>
    </div>
    <div class="event-info">
      <h3>Show &amp; Tell</h3>
      <p>Virtual — Students and researchers present ML projects and receive community feedback. Open to all.</p>
      <span class="event-tag tag-monthly">Monthly</span>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

<details style="margin-top: 1rem; font-size: 0.9rem;">
  <summary style="cursor: pointer; font-weight: 600; color: #475569;">Past Events</summary>
  <ul style="margin-top: 0.5rem; color: #64748b; font-size: 0.85rem;">
    <li>SciTinyML 2025 — ICTP, Trieste, Italy</li>
    <li>SciTinyML 2024 — ICTP, Trieste, Italy</li>
    <li>SciTinyML 2023 — ICTP, Trieste, Italy</li>
    <li>SciTinyML 2022 — ICTP (Virtual)</li>
    <li>TinyML Research Symposium 2022</li>
    <li>SciTinyML 2021 — ICTP (Virtual)</li>
    <li>tinyML Summit 2021 — Industry + Academic Track</li>
  </ul>
</details>
```

## Global Network {#network}

AI engineering education should not be limited by geography or resources. Through the TinyML4D Academic Network and partnerships with ICTP, the tinyML Foundation, and global universities, we are building infrastructure for accessible, high-quality ML systems education worldwide.

```{=html}
<div class="map-container">
  <svg viewBox="0 0 800 400" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" style="max-width: 700px;">
    <rect width="800" height="400" fill="none"/>
    <!-- North America -->
    <circle cx="180" cy="140" r="6" fill="#A51C30" opacity="0.8"/>
    <circle cx="180" cy="140" r="12" fill="#A51C30" opacity="0.15"/>
    <text x="180" y="165" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Inter, sans-serif" font-size="10" font-weight="600" fill="#64748b">North America</text>
    <text x="180" y="177" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Inter, sans-serif" font-size="8" fill="#94a3b8">Harvard, Columbia, Dartmouth</text>
    <!-- Latin America -->
    <circle cx="240" cy="280" r="6" fill="#3d9e5a" opacity="0.8"/>
    <circle cx="240" cy="280" r="12" fill="#3d9e5a" opacity="0.15"/>
    <text x="240" y="305" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Inter, sans-serif" font-size="10" font-weight="600" fill="#64748b">Latin America</text>
    <text x="240" y="317" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Inter, sans-serif" font-size="8" fill="#94a3b8">Brazil, Colombia, Mexico, Argentina</text>
    <!-- Europe -->
    <circle cx="430" cy="130" r="6" fill="#4a90c4" opacity="0.8"/>
    <circle cx="430" cy="130" r="12" fill="#4a90c4" opacity="0.15"/>
    <text x="430" y="155" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Inter, sans-serif" font-size="10" font-weight="600" fill="#64748b">Europe</text>
    <text x="430" y="167" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Inter, sans-serif" font-size="8" fill="#94a3b8">ICTP, Netherlands, Germany, Spain</text>
    <!-- Africa -->
    <circle cx="440" cy="260" r="6" fill="#c87b2a" opacity="0.8"/>
    <circle cx="440" cy="260" r="12" fill="#c87b2a" opacity="0.15"/>
    <text x="440" y="285" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Inter, sans-serif" font-size="10" font-weight="600" fill="#64748b">Africa</text>
    <text x="440" y="297" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Inter, sans-serif" font-size="8" fill="#94a3b8">Kenya, Morocco, Nigeria, Rwanda</text>
    <!-- Asia -->
    <circle cx="600" cy="180" r="6" fill="#a31f34" opacity="0.8"/>
    <circle cx="600" cy="180" r="12" fill="#a31f34" opacity="0.15"/>
    <text x="600" y="205" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Inter, sans-serif" font-size="10" font-weight="600" fill="#64748b">Asia</text>
    <text x="600" y="217" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Inter, sans-serif" font-size="8" fill="#94a3b8">India, Malaysia, Singapore</text>
    <!-- Oceania -->
    <circle cx="680" cy="310" r="4" fill="#6b7280" opacity="0.6"/>
    <text x="680" y="330" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Inter, sans-serif" font-size="9" font-weight="600" fill="#64748b">Oceania</text>
    <!-- Connections -->
    <line x1="180" y1="140" x2="430" y2="130" stroke="#e2e8f0" stroke-width="0.8" stroke-dasharray="4,3" opacity="0.5"/>
    <line x1="430" y1="130" x2="600" y2="180" stroke="#e2e8f0" stroke-width="0.8" stroke-dasharray="4,3" opacity="0.5"/>
    <line x1="430" y1="130" x2="440" y2="260" stroke="#e2e8f0" stroke-width="0.8" stroke-dasharray="4,3" opacity="0.5"/>
    <line x1="180" y1="140" x2="240" y2="280" stroke="#e2e8f0" stroke-width="0.8" stroke-dasharray="4,3" opacity="0.5"/>
  </svg>
  <div class="map-legend">
    <div class="map-legend-item"><span class="map-legend-dot" style="background:#A51C30;"></span> Lead Institutions</div>
    <div class="map-legend-item"><span class="map-legend-dot" style="background:#3d9e5a;"></span> TinyML4D Partners</div>
    <div class="map-legend-item"><span class="map-legend-dot" style="background:#4a90c4;"></span> Research Collaborators</div>
    <div class="map-legend-item"><span class="map-legend-dot" style="background:#c87b2a;"></span> Emerging Network</div>
  </div>
</div>
```

## Research {#research}

The community contributes to applied research across multiple domains, with publications in IEEE, ACM, and scientific journals.

- **Environmental monitoring** — water leakage detection, animal tracking, sustainability assessment
- **Healthcare** — atrial fibrillation detection, disease classification on microcontrollers
- **Smart infrastructure** — predictive maintenance, indoor localization, asset tracking
- **Education** — scaling ML training in developing regions, curriculum design
- **Benchmarking** — MLPerf Tiny, energy-efficient inference measurement

For the full publication list, see the [research page on tinyml.seas.harvard.edu](https://tinyml.seas.harvard.edu/research).

## Partners {#partners}

```{=html}
<div class="partner-grid">
  <div class="partner-item">Harvard SEAS</div>
  <div class="partner-item">tinyML Foundation</div>
  <div class="partner-item">ICTP</div>
  <div class="partner-item">Google</div>
  <div class="partner-item">Arduino</div>
  <div class="partner-item">Edge Impulse</div>
  <div class="partner-item">Seeed Studio</div>
  <div class="partner-item">Barnard / Columbia</div>
  <div class="partner-item">UNIFEI</div>
  <div class="partner-item">Edge AI Foundation</div>
</div>
```

## Contact {#contact}

```{=html}
<div class="cta-box">
  <h3>Bring AI Engineering to your institution</h3>
  <p>Whether you want to adopt the curriculum, join the TinyML4D network, host a workshop, or contribute to the textbook — we want to hear from you.</p>
  <a href="https://mlsysbook.ai/instructors/" class="cta-btn-primary">Instructor Hub</a>
  <a href="mailto:edu@tinyML.org" class="cta-btn-secondary">Email Us</a>
  <a href="https://github.com/harvard-edge/cs249r_book/discussions" class="cta-btn-secondary">Discussions</a>
</div>
```

:::
